title: MetaMask card launches across US
snippet: Consensys, a leading Ethereum software technology company, today announced the General Availability (GA) of the MetaMask Card across the United States, marking a major milestone in bridging crypto with everyday finance.

title: Oobit Launches Real-Time Wallet-to-Bank Transfers to Bridge Stablecoins and Local Banking - Bitcoin.com News
